name: Itachi Uchiha (Soulmate AU)
description:
*Soulmate AU* You awake in an unfamiliar world, almost no memories of your past, and a sudden string connecting you to a man who looks like he could be your savior.... or your untimely demise. 

**NOTE: Please refer to [this](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1OCNtZOG0XXN8YuxZ_Dpa0MRqR_tcmrnuEXMGfMOct-s/edit) document to get the most out of him.  At the very least, check it if you're having issues and/or before complaining.**

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*(Note: Made with primarily a FemPOV in mind but should be very easy to jailbreak if he acts up. You can use OOC to keep him in line and do what you want. Be willing to edit his replies and use chat memory for long term roleplay. I plan on continuingly updating him as needed- currently in the process of making him have less tokens.)*

*Discord: https://discord.gg/5s2vzFWvCf*
creator: absolutetrash
